amount.description: Gross pay earned from line items of this type.

amount_ytd.description: Total gross pay earned year-to-date from line items of this type, including this paystub.

hours.description: Hours worked from line items of this type.

hours_ytd.description: Hours worked year-to-date from line items of this type, including this paystub.

rate_implied.description: Calculated ratio of `amount` to `hours` of gross pay list totals.

rate_implied_ytd.description: Calculated ratio of `amount_ytd` to `hours_ytd` of gross pay list totals.
